h65e76dd8g4d74g4504gb92cgedd20deb37ef: Listen, I'm rapidly coming to the conclusion our joint travels are destined to fail. I could say it's me, not you, but that would be a lie.
ha518cbb8gbb68g4e94g85edgbf52aa60368b: So unless an honest effort is made on your part, I don't think we'll be travelling together much longer.
